sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Latest DMA News - Destra Multi-Alternative Fund Announces Boar...
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Destra Multi-Alternative Fund (DMA) news, focusing on distribution policies, governance, and structural changes. It highlights announcements regarding increased monthly distributions, shareholder approvals for policy revisions, and a recent board member resignation. The fund aims for long-term performance non-correlated to broader markets, emphasizing income generation through alternative strategies.

feed.title: Diversified Healthcare Trust Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Release
feed.summary: Diversified Healthcare Trust (DHC) will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Monday, May 4, 2026. This report will detail the performance of its substantial $6.3 billion portfolio, which includes senior housing, medical office, and life science properties. A conference call with CEO Christopher Bilotto is scheduled for May 5, 2026, to discuss the figures and strategic direction.

feed.title: A Look At Donnelley Financial Solutions (DFIN) Valuation As It Accelerates Its Shift To Cloud Software
feed.summary: Donnelley Financial Solutions (DFIN) is transitioning from financial printing to cloud software, focusing on SaaS recurring revenue and automated compliance. Despite an 18.2% discount to intrinsic value and a 31% discount to some analyst targets, its P/E ratio of 38.9x is higher than peers. The company's valuation faces risks from weaker capital markets and slower software adoption, but its software pivot suggests potential for future growth.

feed.title: A Look At Waste Management (WM) Valuation After CIBC Highlights Sector Resilience And AI Productivity Gains
feed.summary: CIBC Capital Markets' Q1/26 earnings preview highlights Waste Management (WM) due to sector resilience, inflation-plus pricing, AI-driven productivity gains, and M&A. Simply Wall St values WM at $253.12, indicating it's 8% undervalued, citing strategic investments and synergies from WM Healthcare Solutions. However, its high P/E ratio of 34.7x compared to the industry average of 22.9x suggests a premium for earnings, prompting investors to weigh the upside signals against the current price.

feed.title: BlackRock’s New IQQ ETF Takes On Invesco And Prompts Valuation Review
feed.summary: BlackRock has launched the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF (IQQ), directly competing with Invesco's long-established Nasdaq 100 product and expanding options for investors seeking technology-focused exposure. This move by BlackRock, whose shares (NYSE:BLK) are trading around $958.46, reflects a broader index licensing strategy and introduces new competition into the large-cap growth ETF market. The article also touches on BlackRock's valuation, indicating its shares trade below analyst targets but close to estimated fair value.

feed.title: Is Coca-Cola (KO) Offering A Valuation Opportunity After Recent Share Price Strength
feed.summary: Coca-Cola's stock (KO) recently closed at US$75.91, showing 9.8% year-to-date and 14.2% annual returns despite a slight decline over the last 30 days. According to Simply Wall St's discounted cash flow analysis, the stock appears undervalued by 13.4% with an intrinsic value of US$87.69. The P/E ratio also suggests it is slightly undervalued compared to its calculated "Fair Ratio," offering a potential valuation opportunity.

feed.title: Rogers Stadium Drives More Than $500 Million in Economic Activity in First Season
feed.summary: Rogers Stadium generated over $500 million in economic activity during its first season in Toronto, including $388 million in GDP and $115 million in tax revenue. The venue's 14 concerts and 700,000 fans supported over 3,000 full-time jobs and boosted local businesses, solidifying Toronto's role as a major destination for live music. Live Nation Canada's assessment highlights the significant economic contributions of the privately funded outdoor music venue and its positive impact on the city's tourism and employment sectors.

feed.title: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $1.59
feed.summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.59 per share, marking a 6.0% increase from the previous dividend. The dividend is payable on May 8th to shareholders of record on April 10th and implies an annualized yield of 1.8%. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance, demonstrating robust financial health and a consistent history of dividend increases over 34 years.

feed.title: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) to Issue $0.28 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share, payable on May 1st to shareholders of record on April 10th, resulting in an annualized yield of 4.0%. The company recently beat Q1 earnings estimates with an EPS of $0.52 and revenue of $33.47 billion, and its dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 49.8%. AT&T is currently trading near $28, has a market cap of approximately $195 billion, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $30.74.

feed.title: Ellington Financial Inc. Plans Monthly Dividend of $0.13 (NYSE:EFC)
feed.summary: Ellington Financial Inc. (NYSE:EFC) has declared a monthly dividend of $0.13 per share, totaling an annualized dividend of $1.56 and yielding 13.0%. Shareholders of record on April 30th will receive the dividend on May 29th, with an ex-dividend date of April 30th. The company's payout ratio is 91.2%, which is covered by current earnings, though analysts project EPS to be $1.67 next year, potentially leading to a payout ratio of 93.4%.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Climb in Premarket Trading; United Airlines, American Airlines Group Lead
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures showed gains in premarket trading, with United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) and American Airlines Group Inc. (AAL) leading the way. Both airline stocks saw significant increases of over 12% before the market opened.

feed.title: Golden Gaming aims to go private
feed.summary: Shareholders of Golden Entertainment Inc. have approved an agreement to take the casino and tavern operator private. The deal involves company founder Blake Sartini acquiring the operating business and Vici Properties Inc. purchasing the real estate of several Golden properties, valued at approximately $1.16 billion. Upon completion, Golden Entertainment will be delisted from Nasdaq and no longer publicly traded.

feed.title: Uber Expands Amazon AWS Bet To Handle Millions Of Trips Faster
feed.summary: Uber is deepening its partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to enhance its real-time operations, leveraging AWS Graviton4 chips for faster rider-driver matching and improved handling of demand spikes. The company is also piloting AWS Trainium3 to train AI models for better arrival estimates and personalization. Despite a recent "death cross," Uber's stock shows a growth-heavy profile and analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $108.33.

feed.title: Jabil (NYSE: JBL) Q2 FY26 revenue jumps 23% as EPS and cash flow rise
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. reported strong financial results for Q2 FY26, with net revenue increasing 23% to $8.28 billion and diluted EPS rising to $2.08. The growth was primarily driven by the Intelligent Infrastructure segment, benefiting from higher demand in cloud and data center, capital equipment, and networking. The company also demonstrated strong cash flow generation, repurchased 2.7 million shares for $600 million, and expanded through strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: Wells Fargo commits $6M to west Charlotte housing, workforce and small business efforts
feed.summary: Wells Fargo is investing $6 million in West Charlotte to support housing development, workforce training, and small business growth. This funding aims to revitalize the community, including the launch of its first full-service grocery store in over 30 years. The initiative highlights Wells Fargo's commitment to community development in the region.

feed.title: Jefferson Bridge Capital LLC Purchases Shares of 9,265 HCA Healthcare, Inc. $HCA
feed.summary: Jefferson Bridge Capital LLC has acquired a new stake of 9,265 shares of HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) valued at approximately $4.33 million, making it their fifth-largest holding. This comes amidst recent insider selling by two executives totaling over $4.8 million. HCA Healthcare also reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates, increasing revenue, and raising its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Jefferson Bridge Capital LLC Invests $2.47 Million in Duke Energy Corporation $DUK
feed.summary: Jefferson Bridge Capital LLC has invested $2.47 million in Duke Energy Corporation, acquiring 21,090 shares, which represents 2.5% of its portfolio. While Duke Energy reported a slight earnings beat, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating due to potential risks from proposed rate increases facing local opposition and infrastructure damage costs. The stock also saw insider selling from a SVP and CEO.

feed.title: Regeneron expects $102 million IPR&D charge to impact Q1 2026 earnings
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) announced an expected pre-tax charge of approximately $102 million for acquired in-process research and development (IPR&D) in its first-quarter 2026 financial results. This charge, primarily related to collaboration and licensing agreements, is projected to reduce both GAAP and non-GAAP net income per diluted share by about $0.81. The company emphasized that these are preliminary estimates and actual results could differ, noting that IPR&D charges are unpredictable in occurrence, size, and timing.

feed.title: Henry Schein board to shrink to 10 members after annual meeting
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. announced plans to reduce its Board of Directors from 15 to 10 members after its Annual Meeting on May 21, 2026. Stanley M. Bergman will retire but be designated Chairman Emeritus, and four other directors will not seek re-election. The company also reported strong financial results for Q4 2025, exceeding EPS and revenue forecasts, while InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is slightly overvalued.

feed.title: Republic Services opens upgraded recycling facility in Peabody
feed.summary: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) has opened an upgraded recycling facility in Peabody, Massachusetts, featuring automated sorting and AI technology to process 35-40 tons of recyclables per hour. This enhancement aims to boost recycling capacity and support Massachusetts' waste reduction goals. Despite the operational upgrade, InvestingPro data suggests the stock is currently overvalued relative to its Fair Value, and recent earnings reports indicate financial performance slightly below consensus expectations, leading to varied analyst ratings.

feed.title: Mosaic to idle Brazil facilities, cut production by 1M tonnes
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company announced it will idle its Araxá Mining and Chemical Complex and related mining activities at the Patrocínio Complex in Brazil to reduce costs, cutting annual phosphate production by approximately 1 million tonnes. The company plans to sell the Araxá assets and continue developing a niobium opportunity at Patrocínio. Despite recent stock declines and downgrades from financial firms due to concerns over phosphate margins, Mosaic maintains that the idling will have a limited impact on adjusted EBITDA, excluding one-time closure costs, and continues its 16-year dividend payment streak.

feed.title: Business Travel Accident Insurance Market is estimated to Hit
feed.summary: The Business Travel Accident Insurance Market is projected to reach US$ 5.88 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 7.2% from US$ 3.2 billion in 2025. This growth is driven by increasing corporate travel, regulatory compliance, and employee safety priorities. Key players include Zurich Insurance Group and American International Group, with significant recent M&A activity and AI-driven underwriting modules enhancing market dynamics.

feed.title: Joshua Warren joins FactSet (NYSE: FDS) as CFO, succeeding Helen Shan in planned transition
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. announced Joshua Warren as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 13, 2026, replacing Helen Shan in a planned transition. Ms. Shan will step down but remain for a transition period, and her departure is not due to disagreements over financial reporting. Mr. Warren's compensation package includes a $500,000 base salary, annual bonuses, and significant equity awards, structured to align with long-term company performance.

feed.title: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC Has $61.61 Million Stock Position in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Performance Wealth Partners LLC increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. by 1.5% to 94,271 shares, now valued at $61.61 million, making it the firm's 11th largest holding. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in GEV. GE Vernova reported strong earnings of $13.39 EPS against an expected $2.99 and revenue of $10.96 billion, with Wall Street analysts largely recommending a "Buy" rating and an average price target of $863.61.

feed.title: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC Sells 2,430 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC has reduced its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) by 3.5% during the fourth quarter, selling 2,430 shares and now owning 67,828 shares valued at $58.49 million. Costco recently reported strong quarterly results, beating analyst estimates with $4.58 EPS and $69.6 billion in revenue, and paying a $1.30 quarterly dividend. While analyst sentiment is generally positive, some express concern about Costco's premium valuation limiting its upside potential.

feed.title: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC Purchases 14,757 Shares of Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 36.3% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 14,757 shares, bringing their total holdings to 55,373 shares valued at approximately $3.045 million. This comes despite recent insider selling, with Bernard A. Mensah and Thomas M. Scrivener offloading shares worth millions. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for BAC, with an average price target of $58.90, though some firms have recently adjusted their targets.

feed.title: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC Reduces Holdings in KKR & Co. Inc. $KKR
feed.summary: Perfromance Wealth Partners LLC reduced its stake in KKR & Co. Inc. by 8.5% in Q4 2025, selling 16,393 shares and retaining 175,958 shares valued at $22.43 million. Despite this reduction, significant insider buying occurred on February 17th, 2026, with CEO Joseph Y. Bae and Director Matt Cohler acquiring substantial shares. Institutional ownership remains high at 76.26%, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $141.20 for KKR, which trades near $90.62.

feed.title: Republic Services opens expanded recycling facility in Massachusetts
feed.summary: Republic Services Inc. (NYSE: RSG) has opened its upgraded Peabody Recycling Center in Massachusetts, featuring advanced technology to enhance recycling capacity. The 54,000-square-foot facility incorporates automated sorting, AI, and improved safety systems, capable of processing 35-40 tons of recyclables per hour. This expansion aims to increase material diversion from landfills and provide cleaner commodities to end-users across greater Boston.

feed.title: Oscar Mayer Unveils First Bacon Innovation in Five Years with New Maple Bourbon Bacon
feed.summary: Oscar Mayer has introduced its first new bacon product in five years, Maple Bourbon Bacon, which is cured with Evan Williams Bourbon. This innovation aims to meet consumer demand for new, flavorful bacon options, incorporating sweet, smoky, and savory notes. The brand also plans to launch additional limited-edition bacon flavors annually and new hot dog varieties for the summer grilling season.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Axon Enterprise to $625 From $720, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has updated its price target for Axon Enterprise, decreasing it to $625 from the previous $720, but the firm is maintaining its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised valuation while still indicating confidence in the company's future performance. Axon Enterprise specializes in public safety technology, including body cameras and TASER devices.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation stock: Strong amid oil shocks—what you need to know now
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's stock is near record highs due to geopolitical oil surges, but a recent after-hours drop signals caution. The company boasts a diversified business model, consistent dividend growth, and strategic projects positioning it for future growth, despite concerns about narrowing refining margins and long-term energy transition shifts. Investors should monitor Q1 2026 earnings, oil prices, and analyst reports to determine entry points.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on General Mills to $33 From $35, Maintains Underweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for General Mills (GIS) to $33 from $35, while maintaining an "Underweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the continued analytical scrutiny and re-evaluation of the consumer food giant's future performance by financial institutions. The article briefly mentions other recent analyst actions and General Mills' business activities.

feed.title: ExxonMobil stock falls on Middle East production disruptions
feed.summary: ExxonMobil's stock dropped due to production disruptions in Qatar and the UAE caused by Middle East conflicts, impacting global oil-equivalent production by approximately 6%. The company expects a significant earnings impact from financial hedges and commodity price increases, though first-quarter earnings per share are still projected to exceed prior quarter levels excluding these timing effects. Despite the setbacks, ExxonMobil announced the first production from its Golden Pass LNG Train 1 and plans to increase Permian production in 2026.

feed.title: Why the U.S. Navy’s retail business is fighting Walmart and Amazon to fund its own future
feed.summary: The U.S. Navy’s retail business, Nexcom, is struggling to compete with giants like Walmart and Amazon, leading to declining sales and reduced funding for crucial morale, welfare, and recreation (MWR) programs for service members and their families. To counter this, Nexcom has embarked on an ambitious turnaround plan, investing in store modernizations, improving merchandise curation, and enhancing the shopping experience to attract and retain military customers. Despite falling sales over the past decade, recent efforts show a slight improvement in customer satisfaction and sales growth, indicating the potential effectiveness of their "Store of the Future" initiative.

feed.title: BlackRock, Envestnet veteran Joshua Warren takes FactSet CFO post
feed.summary: FactSet (NYSE: FDS) has appointed Joshua B. Warren as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 13, 2026, succeeding Helen Shan. Warren brings extensive financial and strategic experience from previous roles at Envestnet, BlackRock, Barclays Capital, and the U.S. Treasury. The company stated that Shan's departure is not related to any disagreements regarding accounting practices or financial disclosures.

feed.title: Henry Schein to Reduce Size of the Board of Directors following 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. announced plans to reduce the size of its Board of Directors from fifteen to ten members following its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 21, 2026. Stanley M. Bergman will retire from the Board after 44 years of service and will be designated Chairman Emeritus. Additionally, Joseph L. Herring, Robert J. Hombach, Scott Serota, and Bradley T. Sheares will not seek re-election.

feed.title: Gene-editing company Precision BioSciences presents at Needham on April 14
feed.summary: Precision BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTIL), a clinical-stage gene editing company, announced its participation in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference. The company will deliver a corporate presentation on Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 9:30 AM ET, utilizing its proprietary ARCUS® platform for in vivo gene editing therapies. This presentation will highlight their advancements in developing treatments for diseases with high unmet medical needs.

feed.title: Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ: DTIL) details equity plan, charter change in 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ: DTIL) is set to hold its 2026 virtual annual meeting on May 21, 2026, where stockholders will vote on seven key proposals including the election of two Class I directors, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche as the auditor, and an advisory say-on-pay vote for executive compensation. The company is also seeking approval to significantly amend its 2019 Incentive Award Plan by adding 3,800,000 shares for future equity awards and to modify its Certificate of Incorporation to extend Delaware officer exculpation protections. Additionally, a proposal to adjourn the meeting if insufficient support for key items is received will also be put to a vote.

feed.title: Republic Services Celebrates Opening of Expanded Peabody Recycling Center
feed.summary: Republic Services announced the grand opening of its expanded Peabody Recycling Center in Massachusetts. This state-of-the-art facility features advanced technology, including automated sorting and AI-powered systems, to significantly increase processing capacity to 35-40 tons of recyclables per hour. The upgrade aims to enhance recycling efforts in the greater Boston area, divert more waste from landfills, and produce cleaner materials for end markets, supporting Massachusetts' waste-reduction goals.

feed.title: Dow Inc. and Lyondell Stocks Plunge. Why Iran Could Spark a Brutal Chemicals Selloff.
feed.summary: Commodity chemical stocks, including Dow Inc. and Lyondell, have seen a recent surge but their fortunes appear to be changing. This shift comes after a two-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran, contingent on Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz, which could potentially lead to a significant selloff in the chemicals sector.

feed.title: Delta leads the airline sector higher after earnings, oil price decline (DAL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) stock rose in premarket trading after the company reported strong first-quarter results, with revenue up 12.9% year-over-year to $15.9 billion, surpassing analyst estimates. The airline also saw healthy unit revenue improvement across all geographies, including a positive inflection in its main cabin. The overall airline sector is benefiting from Delta's positive earnings report and a decline in oil prices.

feed.title: Flavors and Fragrances Market 2026-2033 | US$ 48.3 Billion
feed.summary: The global Flavors and Fragrances Market is projected to reach US$ 48.3 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 4.9% from US$ 33.0 billion in 2025. This growth is driven by increasing consumer demand for enhanced sensory experiences, natural ingredients, and convenience foods, with key players like International Flavors & Fragrances, Givaudan, and Firmenich leading innovation. The market report provides insights into key developments, regional analysis, and segmentation by type (synthetic vs. natural) and end-usage, aiming to help stakeholders make informed decisions.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Consumer Cyclical Companies: Booking Holdings (BKNG) and Domino’s Pizza (DPZ)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided insights on consumer cyclical companies Booking Holdings (BKNG) and Domino’s Pizza (DPZ). Jake Fuller from BTIG maintained a Buy rating on Booking Holdings with a $250.00 price target, while Jon Tower from Citi maintained a Hold rating on Domino’s Pizza with a $425.00 price target. The article details analyst consensus and recent price targets for both companies.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Corporation $TPL Holdings Lifted by Hunter Associates Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: Hunter Associates Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Texas Pacific Land (TPL) by 199.6% in Q4, now owning 12,198 shares valued at $3.503 million. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $1.79 EPS and $211.6 million in revenue, and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.60. Analyst sentiment remains mixed, with KeyCorp maintaining an "Overweight" rating and a target of $639, while Wall Street overall has a "Hold" consensus.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS Shares Purchased by Hunter Associates Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: Hunter Associates Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 70.5%, acquiring an additional 2,514 shares. This brings their total holdings to 6,078 shares, valued at approximately $2.853 million. The company recently surpassed Q4 EPS estimates and reported strong revenue growth, though analyst sentiment remains mixed with an average "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Hunter Associates Investment Management LLC Acquires 7,194 Shares of RTX Corporation $RTX
feed.summary: Hunter Associates Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in RTX Corporation by 111.7%, adding 7,194 shares to hold a total of 13,637 shares valued at approximately $2.50 million. This move comes despite substantial insider selling totaling over $18 million in the past 90 days. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for RTX, citing a positive business outlook including a $3.8 billion F135 contract modification for Pratt & Whitney.

feed.title: Software company ServiceNow’s investment team shrinks with Kirk departure
feed.summary: Philip Kirk, Senior Vice-President of corporate and business development at ServiceNow, has left the company after nearly six years, marking a further reduction in ServiceNow's investment team. His departure follows that of Vishal Kumar Gupta, VP of corporate development and ventures, less than six months ago. ServiceNow Ventures, launched in 2015, plans to increase its CVC budget from $300m to $1bn and has recently participated in significant funding rounds for AI technology companies.

feed.title: Jericho Financial LLP Buys 1,116 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Jericho Financial LLP increased its stake in Costco (COST) by 30.5% in Q4, acquiring 1,116 additional shares to hold a total of 4,777 shares valued at approximately $4.12 million. Other institutional investors also modified their holdings, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $1,039.13. Costco reported strong earnings, beating estimates with EPS of $4.58 and revenue of $69.6 billion, although insider selling and valuation concerns are noted.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. $CAT Stock Holdings Reduced by Jericho Financial LLP
feed.summary: Jericho Financial LLP has reduced its stake in Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) by 16.4%, now holding 11,125 shares valued at $6.37 million. Despite this, Caterpillar recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $5.16 and revenue of $19.13 billion, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $737.55. Other institutional investors, however, significantly increased their holdings in Caterpillar during the third quarter.

feed.title: BD Delivers Next‑Generation TIPS Innovation to Advance Portal Hypertension Care Across the European Union
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) announced the CE Mark application for its Liverty™ TIPS Stent Graft, introducing a next-generation, adjustable-diameter device for portal hypertension care in the European Union. This innovation aims to expand treatment options for patients with advanced liver disease and cirrhosis. Safety and effectiveness data from the pivotal ARCH clinical trial for the Liverty™ TIPS Stent Graft will be presented for the first time at the Society of Interventional Radiology Annual Scientific Meeting on April 12, 2026.
